expense_date_future: Expense date cannot be in the future
files_required: At least one receipt is required
amount_negative: Amount must be greater than zero

errors.network: Could not reach the server. Please try again later.

about.title: About
about.body: Cashflow is an invoice and expense management system at {compsciwebsite}.

help.title: Help
help.body: If you need help using Cashflow, you can contact your committee manager or the chapter's treasurer.

issues.title: Something not working?
issues.body: Create an issue on Github and it'll usually be resolved as quickly as possible. If you'd like to help develop the chapter's systems, drop by one of the Hacker evenings organized on some Thursdays by the Information organ. Say hi!

welcome.title: Cashflow
welcome.intro: Is this your first time using Cashflow?

process.title: How do I use Cashflow and what happens to the receipt?

registration.title: Registration
registration.description: You who bought something for the chapter register your receipt here in Cashflow

validation.title: Receipt confirmation
validation.description: The chapter's treasurer confirms that the receipt meets the requirements for a receipt and that the scanned receipt is of good quality

attestation.title: Attestation
attestation.description: Your committee chair, the treasurer or the finance officer approves your receipt.

payment.title: Payment
payment.description: Your committee chair, the treasurer or the finance officer pays out the receipt. Several receipts can be paid out at once.

accounting.title: Accounting
accounting.description: The treasurer or a finance officer books the receipt

preview.empty: Select an expense to preview and confirm it

new_expense.title: New expense
new_expense.upload_prompt: Upload one or more photos of your receipt

date.label: Purchase date
date.help: The date on which the purchase was made (same as on the receipt)

expense_parts.label: Expense parts
expense_parts.help: Here you specify what portion of the receipt was purchased for each budget line. The total of the receipt must be greater than or exactly equal to the sum of the rows below, without rounding to the nearest cent.

new_invoice.title: New invoice
new_invoice.disclaimer: Here you register invoices that the chapter is due to pay or has already paid. If you paid an invoice yourself, you should {new_expense_link} instead.

description.label: Description
description.help: A description of the invoice and why it should be paid

invoice_date.label: Invoice date
invoice_date.help: The date on which the invoice was issued.

due_date.label: Due date
due_date.help: The date on which the invoice is due.

files.label: Image or PDF files of the invoice

invoice_parts.label: Invoice parts
invoice_parts.help: Here you specify what portion of the invoice should be paid for each budget line. The total amount of the invoice must be exactly equal to the sum of the rows.

attest_disabled_flagged: Cannot attest — this expense is flagged
confirm_disabled_flagged: Cannot confirm — this expense is flagged

alerts.expense_part_attested: The receipt part has been attested
alerts.invoice_part_attested: The invoice part has been attested
